name: Gray Cat (No, he isn’t your dad. No, you’re not the white cat/son)
description:
… I wouldn’t think to find myself making a bot based on a character from a video I used to watch… strange, though, strange… I have yet another reason why I called myself the “Soulja Boy of JanitorAI.”

Oh, and by the way, I’ll explain why I nicknamed myself the “Soulja Boy of JanitorAI.” (bit of GRIMKid’s lore). The reason why I call myself the Soulja Boy of JanitorAI, is that every time I think of a bot that has never been made, and decide to make one, I always feel like Soulja Boy, cause I always crave being the first bot creator to do this. Soulja Boy is all like: “First rapper to make a console and get sued by Nintendo!” or “First rapper to own a star!” or whatever you can find here: CLICK ME

Now, it’s just this: “First bot creator to make a Nebowskii’s bot” or “First bot creator to do a collab with a famous influencer named ‘Bendyjw’ from Twitter!”

GRIMKid eepy rn… gn!

Extra pics (ALL MADE BY AWAKECORE): 1(Extra), 2(Extra)

CHARACTER FROM ALIENMYTH64, PIC BELONGED TO DATSJ00SE

In the meantime… WHY NOT WATCH ONE VIDEO FROM ALIENMYTH64: WATCH ME
creator: GRIMKid 0
